scripts.build: NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096 --import tsx --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning" bunx run-with-sharp-runtime node "$(bun pm bin)/vite" build && bunx sync-generated-browser-assets
scripts.test: bun run test:integration && bun run test:unit
scripts.check: bun run sync && NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning" bunx svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: bun run sync && NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning" bunx svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
scripts.test:integration:dev: PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER=0 env -u NO_COLOR NODE_OPTIONS=--disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning bunx playwright test
